extension.description: A tag-based Markdown journaling tool for easy daily note-taking.
vsJournal.configuration.title: VS Journal
vsJournal.configuration.autoSave: Delay for auto-save in milliseconds. Set 0 to disable.
vsJournal.configuration.autoSaveMarkdown: If enabled, the document will be saved automatically after the specified delay (ms).
config.journalDir.markdownDescription: Directory where journal files are stored. [Click here to select a folder](command:vs-journal.selectJournalDir)
